prompt_queue.prompt: Bootstrap the repository's technical, developer-facing living documentation from source code. First build a coverage map from README.md, docs/**, source directories, tests, examples, issues, and pull requests. Documentation is not complete until every major public API, extension point, runtime contract, workflow/lifecycle path, data contract, storage/persistence boundary, auth/permission behavior, failure mode, operational workflow, and contributor-facing design principle is documented or explicitly marked out of scope. Prefer one coherent docs surface with an index or clear navigation over isolated pages. Do not stop after a single high-signal gap unless tool, token, or writable-scope limits prevent a full pass; if constrained, state the partial coverage in the pull request body. Open one reviewable documentation pull request with the broadest complete initial docs surface you can produce. Return no_changes only if the repo already has complete, navigable technical docs across the full codebase.
